scripts.start:ui: cd frontend && bun install && bun run build && cd .. && bun --env-file=../.env --hot run src/index.ts
scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,ui -c blue,magenta "bun --env-file=../.env --hot run src/index.ts" "cd frontend && npm run dev"
scripts.restart: lsof -ti :3001 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; bun --env-file=../.env --hot run src/index.ts
scripts.build: cd frontend && bun install && bun run build
